mapper.select: SELECT a.bind_id, a.id, a.link_key, a.page_name, a.link, a.page_key, a.image, a.page_context, a.status, a.recycle, a.create_time, a.create_by, a.update_time FROM (SELECT b.id AS bind_id, b.link_key, p.*, ROW_NUMBER() over ( PARTITION BY b.diy_page_id ) AS top FROM lkt_diy_page_bind b LEFT JOIN lkt_diy_page p ON p.id = b.diy_page_id WHERE b.diy_id = #{id} and p.recycle = 0) AS a WHERE a.top = 1

select count(1) from lkt_diy_page_bind b left join lkt_diy d on d.id = b.diy_id where b.diy_page_id = #{id} AND d.is_del = 0
and d.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
